AUXSAYSTactical knowledge for creators who want control
Hidden route

Vault

This portal edits content in the GitHub repo. It is not linked publicly. Use your own GitHub token here, not credentials embedded into the site.

Connection

Use a fine-grained GitHub token for auxchan/auxsays.github.io with Contents: write. Nothing is baked into the public site.

Not connected yet.
Mode
Existing articles

Site settings

Connect first to save changes.

Article editor

Connect first to save changes.

Asset upload

Images and files

Upload a file into auxsays/assets/uploads/. After upload, use the returned path in your site settings or article cover field.

Connect first to upload.
